attempted_route: pandas.read_excel(sheet_name='MIST3') + hardcoded column selection ['TP9','AF7','AF8','TP10'] averaged via df[cols].mean(axis=1), then manual 30s baseline window + min for onset_hr

recommended_alternative: Use pandas.read_excel(sheet_name='MIST3') then print/inspect df.columns to get exact names, identify the single HR column (likely named 'HR' or 'heart_rate' in bpm), then compute baseline_hr=df['HR'].iloc[:baseline_n].mean(), onset_hr=df['HR'].iloc[baseline_n:].min(), onset_hr_percent=((onset_hr-baseline_hr)/baseline_hr)*100.
